/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/scriptura.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/scriptura.dir/scriptura_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scriptura.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scriptura.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o scriptura  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
